transcription.text: Honey, this is simple. He cleans, we clean. Better, better, because on Tough Bathroom Scum, the power of Pine Sol delivers a knockout. Now, who are you gonna trust? Me or Mr. You-Know-Who over there? The power of Pine Sol, the smell of clean.
